iteration1_baseline.notes: pdf-create failed employee-names criterion (0/20) because model called doc.build() multiple times, overwriting previous content

iteration2_optimized.notes: Both tasks pass after SKILL.md optimization

changes: Stripped SKILL.md from ~295 lines to ~80 lines, removing all content irrelevant to extraction and creation tasks
Added CRITICAL warning about calling doc.build() exactly once with all content in a single list (fixed the pdf-create failure)
Removed scripts/ directory (8 Python scripts not needed)
Focused skill on three core libraries: pdfplumber (extraction), reportlab (creation), pypdf (simple text reading)
Added practical code examples showing the single-build pattern with PageBreak for multi-section PDFs
